task_completion.description: Verify the 'Shop' link is configured to point to /products in the Main navigation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Drupal menu edit screen showing a link titled 'Shop' with the path '/products', or the front-end header showing a 'Shop' link.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Cart' link is configured to point to /cart in the Main navigation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Drupal menu edit screen showing a link titled 'Cart' with the path '/cart', or the front-end header showing a 'Cart' link.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Account' link is configured to point to /user in the Main navigation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Drupal menu edit screen showing a link titled 'Account' with the path '/user', or the front-end header showing an 'Account' link.

task_completion.description: Verify the menu links are in the correct order: Shop, Cart, Account.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Menu configuration list (drag-and-drop interface) or front-end header showing the links in the exact sequence: Shop, Cart, Account.

task_completion.description: Verify a custom block was created containing the copyright text.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Block configuration screen or front-end page showing the text '© 2025 Urban Electronics' (or '2025 Urban Electronics').

task_completion.description: Verify the copyright block is placed in the Footer Bottom region of the Olivero theme.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Drupal Block Layout screen for the Olivero theme showing the custom block under the 'Footer Bottom' region, or the front-end showing the copyright text at the very bottom of the page.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Drupal web interface to configure the menu and blocks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Drupal admin UI (e.g., /admin/structure/menu, /admin/structure/block) being used.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with a real web browser.
integrity.visual_evidence: Browser chrome (address bar, tabs) is visible and shows the Drupal site URL, rather than a text editor or local HTML file.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use terminal commands (like Drush) to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of terminal windows executing Drush or SQL commands to configure the site.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The default theme is Olivero. The Main navigation menu must contain exactly these links in order: 'Shop' (path: /products), 'Cart' (path: /cart), and 'Account' (path: /user). The custom block must contain the text '2025 Urban Electronics' (with or without the copyright symbol) and be placed in the 'Footer Bottom' region of the Olivero theme.
